underlying_goal: Migrate a legacy PHP 7.0 application to PHP 8.x compatibility, updating all dependencies and fixing runtime errors
friction_detail: Assistant began making changes to .htaccess/Caddy routing without investigating first; user stopped them and requested investigation before action
brief_summary: User wanted to upgrade a legacy PHP 7.0 app to work with PHP 8.2, and through iterative debugging fixed dependencies (Flight, Illuminate, Symfony, Carbon), replaced SparkPost/Aura/Valitron, updated frontend CDNs, and began PHPStan level progression — mostly achieved with app functional on PHP 8.2.
user_instructions_to_assistant: Always use subagents for complex tasks
Investigate first, inform, and wait for confirmation before making changes
Do review-only passes without changing anything
Use subagents for planning before touching code
